subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! The letter which thou didst write on the fifteenth of Shabbaṭ was received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نامه که در پانزدهم شباط مرقوم نموده بودید در جوف
subcodes.subjects: @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings
